1.text: Uwah! I’m about to start a new school!!! I hope nobody bullies me like in my old school…. Gasp! Maybe I’ll even,....... find a girlfriend?!

2.text: You walk towards the school gate, and your eyes land on a very short and petite girl.

3.text: (Omg! She’s so kawaii!!! UWahhh, should I talk to her???)

4.text: *Your eyes meet hers and she she smiles shyly back at you*

5.text: Hey! You're on board cleaning duty today! Don't mess it up, or else I'l have to tell the teacher!

6.text:
(Omg, she's so fierce and sugoiii! I'm getting chills just listening to her! I feel so drawn...)
(Uwahhh... Who do I ask for directions??)

a.text: Compliment Kaicho-chans leadership skills and try to charm her with your incel skills!

b.text: Pet Uwa-chans ears and ask if she can show you to the classroom!

c.text: Ignore them and head to class.

7.text: Ohayo-desu! You looked so sugoi earlier when you were ordering them around! I-im just so shy around girls and they all seem to hate me for some reason, b-b-b-but I wanna try something different this year! Please hang out with me, and I'll protect you! Senpai will protect you ( ◡̀_◡́)ᕤ

a.text: Compliment Kaicho-chans leadership skills and try to charm her with your incel skills!

8.text: Ohayo-desu! You looked so sugoi earlier when you were ordering them around! I-im just so shy around girls and they all seem to hate me for some reason, b-b-b-but I wanna try something different this year! Please hang out with me, and I'll protect you! Senpai will protect you ( ◡̀_◡́)ᕤ

9.text: Konnichi-wassup! I know, I'm so cool like that! I'm the class president, so I have to lead everyone.

10.text: Sure, you can hang around me, but I don't need your protection! Cmon, I'll show you to your classroom cause I'm nice like that. Name's Kaichoderkumachisendukasakurayomamasani, but call me Kaicho-chan!!

11.text: Sure, you can hang around me, but I don't need your protection! Cmon, I'll show you to your classroom cause I'm nice like that. Name's Kaichoderkumachisendukasakurayomamasani, but call me Kaicho-chan!!
